text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You're from America too, aren'cha? 
Don'cha miss the taste of a good barbeque?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hm… To be honest, I personally 
prefer Japanese food.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Most of the food I prepare myself 
is also Japanese in style…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Although… having American 
once in a while would be nice.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes! I'd love to have ya!
